rows.command_kor: 접촉 센서가 감지되면 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the contact sensor is detected, turn on the light.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"ContactSensorTriggerLightOn\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#ContactSensor).contactsensor_contact == true) {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    (#Light).switch_on()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]

rows.command_kor: 재실 센서가 감지되면 TV를 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the presence sensor detects someone, turn on the TV.

rows.command_kor: 소리 센서의 수치가 50보다 커지면 스피커 재생을 멈춰줘.
rows.command_eng: When the sound sensor value exceeds 50, stop speaker playback.

rows.command_kor: 비가 오면 제습기를 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When it rains, turn on the dehumidifier.

rows.command_kor: 밝기가 100 럭스 미만이 되면 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the brightness falls below 100 lux, turn on the light.

rows.command_kor: 이산화탄소 농도가 1000ppm 이상이 되면 긴급 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When the carbon dioxide concentration reaches 1000ppm or higher, sound the emergency siren.

rows.command_kor: 연기가 감지되면 사이렌으로 화재경보를 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When smoke is detected, sound the fire alarm with the siren.

rows.command_kor: 버튼이 세번 눌리면 벨브를 열어줘.
rows.command_eng: When the button is pushed 3 times, open the valve.

rows.command_kor: 온도가 35도 이상이 되면 에어컨의 목표 온도를 30도로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: When the temperature reaches 35 degrees or higher, set the air conditioner to 30 degrees.

rows.command_kor: 금고가 열리면 경찰 사이렌을 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When the safe is unlocked, sound the police siren.

rows.command_kor: 누수가 감지되면 벨브를 차단해줘.
rows.command_eng: When a leak is detected, close the valve.

rows.command_kor: 습도가 80%보다 커지면 제습기를 건조 모드로 작동시켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the humidity exceeds 80%, start the dehumidifier in drying mode.

rows.command_kor: 움직임이 감지되면 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When motion is detected, turn on the light.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"MotionDetectedTurnOnLight\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion == true) {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    (#Light).switch_on()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]

rows.command_kor: 내부 초미세먼지 농도가 35 이상이 되면 공기청정기를 강하게 틀어줘.
rows.command_eng: When the indoor very fine dust level becomes 35 or higher, set the air purifier to high.

rows.command_kor: 충전 전압이 250V보다 높아지면 충전을 중단해줘.
rows.command_eng: When the charging voltage exceeds 250V, stop charging.

rows.command_kor: 현관 도어락이 잠금해제되면 거실 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the entrance door lock is unlocked, turn on the living room light.

rows.command_kor: 침실에 움직임이 감지되면 침실 에어컨을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When motion is detected in the bedroom, turn on the bedroom air conditioner.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"BedroomMotionTurnOnAC\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#Bedroom #MotionSensor).motionsensor_motion == true) {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    (#Bedroom #AirConditioner).switch_on()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]

rows.command_kor: 주방에 연기가 감지되면 주방 벨브를 잠궈줘.
rows.command_eng: When a smoke is detected in the kitchen, close the kitchen valve.

rows.command_kor: 서재 미세먼지 농도가 30 이상이 되면 서재 공기청정기를 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the fine dust level in the study reaches 30 or higher, turn on the study air purifier.

rows.command_kor: 지하에 누수가 감지되면 메인 사이렌을 비상모드로 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When a water leak is detected in the basement, sound the main siren in emergency mode.

rows.command_kor: 테라스 조도가 50 미만이 되면 테라스 조명을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the terrace illuminance falls below 50, turn on the terrace light.

rows.command_kor: 차고 문이 열리면 차고 카메라로 사진을 찍어줘.
rows.command_eng: When the garage door is opened, take a picture with the garage camera.

rows.command_kor: 아기방 소리가 40dB보다 커지면 거실 스피커로 아기방에 소음이 감지되었다고 말해줘.
rows.command_eng: When the baby room sound exceeds 40 dB, output "Noise detected in the baby room" through the living room speaker.

rows.command_kor: 세탁실 건조기 회전 속도가 5 이하가 되면 거실 스피커로 세탁이 끝났다고 알려줘.
rows.command_eng: When the laundry room dryer's spin speed drops to 5 or below, announce through the living room speaker that the laundry is done.

rows.command_kor: 창고 온도가 25도 이상이 되면 창고 에어컨을 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the temperature in the pantry reaches 25 degrees or higher, turn on the pantry air conditioner.

rows.command_kor: 욕실 습도가 70%보다 높아지면 욕실 제습기를 동결 방지 모드로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: When the bathroom humidity exceeds 70%, set the bathroom dehumidifier to freeze protection mode.

rows.command_kor: 사무실 버튼이 눌리면 사무실 가습기를 모두 켜줘.
rows.command_eng: When the office button is pushed, turn on all humidifiers in office.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"OfficeButtonHumidifierOn\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#Office #Button).button_button == \\\"pushed\\\") {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    all(#Office #Humidifier).switch_on()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]

rows.command_kor: 복도에 재실 센서가 하나라도 감지되면 모든 복도 조명을 보라색으로 설정해줘.
rows.command_eng: When any presence sensor in the hallway detects presence, set all hallway lights to purple.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"HallwayPresencePurpleLight\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif (all(#Hallway #PresenceSensor).presencesensor_presence ==| true) {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    all(#Hallway #Light).light_movetorgb(128, 0, 128)\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]

rows.command_kor: 서버실 일산화탄소 농도가 5000 ppm 이상이되면 모든 사이렌을 비상모드로 울려줘.
rows.command_eng: When the carbon monoxide level in the server room becomes 5000 ppm or above, sound all sirens in emergency mode.

rows.command_kor: 안방 쉐이드 버튼이 눌리면 쉐이드를 내려줘.
rows.command_eng: When the bedroom shade button is pushed, lower the shade.
rows.candidates: ["{\"name\":\"BedroomShadeButtonLowerShade\",\"cron\":\"\",\"period\":100,\"code\":\"triggered := false\\nif ((#Bedroom #Button #Shade).button_button == \\\"pushed\\\") {\\n  if (triggered == false) {\\n    (#Bedroom #Shade).windowcovering_downorclose()\\n    triggered = true\\n  }\\n} else {\\n  triggered = false\\n}\"}"]
